launch_local.source: Cursor product-path canary must pass post-deploy before live-token promotion

run_once.source: unavailable until stock Cursor exposes a durable headless conversation source

reattach.source: Cursor Helm Gate 0 native_resume_continuity: a new stock TUI resumes the same provider conversation and Longhouse session identity

send_input.source: Cursor Helm Gate 0 idle send: exact prompt digest, native response/stop hooks, and store continuity; active phase is rejected before PTY write

interrupt.source: Cursor Helm Gate 0 ctrl_c_cancel: Ctrl-C stops the active generation, emits aborted/error, preserves the TUI process, and the next turn completes

steer_active_turn.source: unsupported until Cursor exposes a mid-turn injection API

answer_pause.source: Cursor permission hooks use the separate pull-based Longhouse pause-request surface; session.answer_pause machine dispatch is intentionally not advertised

terminate.source: cursor_helm: engine forwards session.terminate; launcher sends SIGKILL to the cursor-agent child pid, unlinks socket/state, and exits.

tail_output.source: cursor_store exact raw storage-v2 source emits cursor-store-render-v2 text, reasoning, tool-call, and tool-result projections

runtime_phase.source: Cursor user hook adapter records native lifecycle/tool events and atomic active/idle/ended phase

transcript_binding.source: Cursor hook conversation_id plus launcher-owned Longhouse session ID binds the matching native store without recency heuristics

turn_start.source: cursor_print structured stream, native create-chat/resume, hooks, and process-group cancellation tests
